legal_basis: Law 3959/2011 on the Protection of Free Competition

content_types.description: Abuse of dominant position, cartel enforcement, sector inquiries
Phase I and Phase II merger control decisions

known_gaps: Decisions prior to 2010 are not systematically indexed
Some older decisions may only be available in Greek and are excluded
Informal guidance and settlement documents not published on epant.gr are excluded
update_frequency: Ongoing — run ingest script to pull new decisions
